name: testing
description: Deterministic test fixtures for the flow execution engine. Not included in user-facing catalog bundles — registered only in E2E test seed-data (see platform/backend/seed-data for the fixture source row).

entries.name: test-ask-name
entries.description: Request a user name via input gate, then write it verbatim to workspace/test/name.txt. Test fixture - not for production.

entries.name: test-write-greeting
entries.description: Read the name from test-ask-name and write a fixed-format greeting file. Test fixture - not for production.

entries.name: test-count-artifacts
entries.description: Count files in workspace/test/ and write the count to a file. Optional node, used to exercise the skip path. Test fixture - not for production.

entries.name: Test Echo Flow
entries.description:
Deterministic 3-node flow for exercising the flow execution engine in tests.
Covers input gate, approval gate, artifact handoff, optional skip, and completion.
Not for production use.
